title: corybas sagittatus
intro: Corybas sagittatus, also known as the Arrow Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It is a type of flowering plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The Arrow Orchid can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
